title: pteroceras pusillus
intro: Pteroceras pusillus is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa, known for its unique and delicate appearance. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to help manage fever, reduce pain and swelling, and support immune function. Pteroceras pusillus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
